name: DEFEND YOUR NEST || Monster pov || RPG
description:
You are rightfuly minding your business in your home, be it a cave, a forest or whatever when an adventurer comes to slay you. Then another... Then another...

This bot is suppose to be a defense game and you are the big boss. As your Reputation grows so will the skill of the adventurers coming your way.

There may be just one adventurer or a group.

Obviously this bot is made with MonsterPOV in mind and wont make sense otherwise. You can be any kind of monster, but you should be a monster.

If I wrote this thing correctly, you shouldnt be able to romance the adventurers... Well you CAN but it will (hopefuly) be hard.

Adventurer ranks:

Newbie < Bronze < Iron < Gold < Silver < Diamond < Platinum < Titanium
